characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Short, neatly parted brown hair. Clear facial features with minimal makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Grey button-down collared shirt. Wears white wired earphones in the middle segment.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैंने सालों तक लोगों को confidently English बोलना सिखाया है। [I have spent years teaching people to speak English confidently.]
Character A says: अब वही AI coaching आपको इस app पर मिलेगी। [Now you will get that same AI coaching on this app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes authority and trust immediately with the audience.
- Hooks the user with the promise of expert-level coaching accessible directly from their phone.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
ENGLISH COACH
मैंने सालों तक लोगों को CONFIDENTLY ENGLISH बोलना सिखाया है
अब वही AI COACHING आपको इस APP पर मिलेगी

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मेरे साथ बोलिए। [Say this with me.]
Character A says: Interview. [Interview.]
Character A says: अब मैं इसे गलत बोल कर दिखाती हूँ। [Now I will show you by saying it incorrectly.]
Character A says: Intar-view. [Intar-view.]
Character A says: App ने बता दिया कि pronunciation गलत है। [The app pointed out that the pronunciation is wrong.]
Character A says: Let me try again. [Let me try again.]
Character A says: Interview. [Interview.]
Character A says: Perfect! [Perfect!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core AI tutor feature in real-time with a relatable word.
- Shows the app's ability to detect mistakes and provide instant, actionable feedback.
- Builds user confidence by showing how easy and rewarding it is to correct a mistake.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
MERE SAATH BOLIE INTERVIEW AB MAIN ISE GALAT BOL KAR DIKHATI HOON INTAR-VIEW APP NE BATA DIYA KI PRONUNCIATION GALAT HAI LET ME TRY AGAIN INTERVIEW PERFECT!
Supernova AI Tutor
Let's begin! Record yourself saying the word below.
interview
Awesome! You're ready for the next one.
98%
We'll come back to this one for more practice later.
66%
Explain My Mistake
Watch Sound

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो आज ही Supernova download करें और अपनी English practice शुरू करें। [So download Supernova today and start your English practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
- Reinforces the brand name and the core value of daily practice.
- Ends on a supportive, older-sibling note without relying on 'free' gimmicks.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
तो आज ही SUPERNOVA DOWNLOAD करें और अपनी ENGLISH PRACTICE शुरू करें
